title: Reduce memory status text runtime fallback

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Audit whether memory.status.report non-verbose text can move from source runtime fallback to codegen-owned primitive IR without changing black-box status text behavior; route the prerequisite if the current primitive/data model is insufficient.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Preserve existing agentic-memory status --format text behavior; do not embed Memory installer policy in command-generation; do not broaden this slice to doctor/report/verify-payload; do not claim #892 completion from JSON-only status coverage.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Stop this slice as a no-go audit when parity requires broader status/payload-entry IR, file the follow-up, and continue #892 with the next bounded lane.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix requires changing black-box text output, moving Memory-specific policy into command-generation, or broadening beyond status text runtime debt.
canonical_core.next_action: Archive this no-go audit after planning proof, then continue #892 through the routed #1008 prerequisite or the next safer runtime-debt lane.
proof_expectations: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: The attempted status text runtime reduction is closed honestly as unsafe for this slice.
#1008 records the required declarative status/payload-entry IR work.
The decomposition carries the no-go finding forward for #892.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: A narrower prerequisite was identified before changing behavior: status text needs declarative payload-entry/status IR.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: #1008: model Memory status text output as declarative payload-entry IR.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The current compact status JSON payload is too small for text parity; status text depends on installer-owned payload-entry expansion, layout detection, per-file action rows, obsolete-file checks, optional append status, version display, and InstallResult formatting.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: Planning health proof before archiving this slice.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: promote #1008 or pick another runtime-debt lane that can be reduced without behavior drift.
